llm_enrichment.about_summary: Arpit Goyal is a SEBI-registered research analyst who publishes reports under SEBI RA regulations with disclosure norms. The entity is listed on SEBI's recognised intermediaries register and provides investment education on mutual funds, brokers, PMS, and related topics. Arpit Goyal is also a speaker and is passionate about finance and the stock market. The entity aims to empower the next generation of STEM innovators through hands-on learning, virtual labs, and AI-powered education.
